title: Interpersonelle Diagnostik und Therapiemodelle (BSc + MSc)
further_info: Recommended Reading Backenstraß M (2021): Cognitive Behavioral Analysis System of Psychotherapy (CBASP). Stuttgart: Kohlhammer. Guhn A, Köhler S, Brakemeier E-L (2019): Kiesler-Kreis-Training – Manual zur Behandlung interpersoneller Probleme. Weinheim: Beltz. Kiesler D J (1983): The 1982 Interpersonal Circle: A taxonomy for complementarity in human transactions. Psychological Review, 90, 185-214. Schramm E (2019): Interpersonelle Psychotherapie (4. Aufl.). Stuttgart: Schattauer. Wiggins JS (1996): An informal history of the interpersonal circumplex tradition. Journal of Personality Assessment, 66, 217-233.
